title: OUTRO — Subscribe
prompt: Medium two-shot in @living-room. @Sara on the LEFT and @Eva on the RIGHT face directly toward the camera, smiling brightly, both waving with both hands. Sara (cheerful): "Subscribe so you don't miss new videos!" Eva (excited): "New episodes every week!" Bright friendly outro lighting, steady centered framing.
